layout.dashboard: Bento grid for module selection (FUR Primera Vez, FUR Servicios, FRG). Use generous spacing (p-8 to p-12).
layout.form_view: Two-column layout on desktop: Left sidebar (250px) sticky navigation (Scrollspy) listing sections. Right side: Main form content (max-w-4xl). Mobile: Collapsible top menu for sections.
layout.form_header: Sticky top bar containing module title and the 3 action buttons: 'Limpiar campos', 'Descargar Plantilla XLSX', 'Cerrar módulo'.
layout.spacing: Use p-6 or p-8 for form section cards. gap-6 for grid inputs.

components.form_section_card: Solid white background, rounded-xl, 1px border colored according to the section code. Header of the card uses the section's pastel background.
components.inputs: Shadcn UI Input, Select, DatePicker. Must have clear focus states (ring-2 ring-primary/50). Left aligned text. Required fields marked with red asterisk.

buttons.primary: Solid primary color, rounded-lg, px-6 py-2. Hover: slightly lighter.
buttons.danger_clear: Subtle red text, hover: bg-red-50 rounded-lg px-4 py-2

images.description: Abstract, soft organic waves in subtle sage green and off-white. Professional, calming background, medical administrative feel.
images.usage: Use as a fixed background for the main dashboard/login screen with an overlay to ensure text readability.

images.description: Modern abstract logo icon for a health insurance claims platform. Interlocking minimal geometric shapes, soft forest green and warm terracotta.
images.usage: Use in the top left navigation or header.

icons.usage: Use for section headers, button icons, and dashboard module cards.

animations.interactions: Subtle translate-y-[-2px] and shadow-md on dashboard card hover. Smooth scrolling when clicking sidebar links to form sections.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install `xlsx` (SheetJS) for generating the Excel files: `yarn add xlsx`
Install `date-fns` and Shadcn Calendar/Popover for DatePicker fields.
Create exhaustive predefined lists for Dropdowns matching Colombian norms (Tipo Documento: CC, CE, PA, RC, TI, AS, MS, UN; Tipo Vehículo; Naturaleza del Evento, etc.). Do not skimp on the options.

Group the 60+ FUR fields into logical sections (Datos del Prestador, Datos de la Víctima, Datos del Vehículo, Datos del Propietario, Datos del Conductor, Datos del Accidente, Datos de Atención). Apply the `section_codes` colors to the UI wrappers of these sections to make it visually harmonious as requested by the user.
Implement a 'Historial' section on the dashboard that lists previously generated forms, reading from localStorage.
Form State Management: Use React Hook Form with Zod for strict validation. Maxlengths must be enforced on inputs.
The 3 required buttons ('Limpiar campos', 'Descargar Plantilla XLSX', 'Cerrar módulo') should always be visible (e.g., sticky header) while inside a module.
Ensure the interface is entirely in Spanish.
Add 'Work Sans' and 'IBM Plex Sans' from Google Fonts to index.html.
